breadcrumbs.title: Breadcrumbs
breadcrumbs.description: Accessible breadcrumbs with per-item icons, swappable separators and optional collapsing when the trail exceeds the max.

seo.metaDescription: Free, open-source Vue Breadcrumbs for Vue 3 and Nuxt: accessible breadcrumbs with per-item icons, swappable separators and optional collapsing when long.
seo.intro: mood-ui's Breadcrumbs is a free, open-source Vue 3 breadcrumbs component — accessible breadcrumb navigation with per-item icons, swappable separators and optional collapsing when the trail exceeds the max.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Simple trail with the default chevron separator. The last item is the current page.

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Each item can declare an optional icon. Useful to reinforce visual hierarchy.

homeIcon.title: With Home icon
homeIcon.desc: `show-home-icon` automatically adds a Home icon to the first item when it doesn't define its own.

separators.title: Separators
separators.desc: Four built-in separators (chevron, slash, dot, arrow) or a custom one via `separator-text`.

truncated.title: Truncated
truncated.desc: When the trail exceeds `max`, middle items collapse into an interactive ellipsis.

props.items: Breadcrumb trail. Each item accepts label, icon, to, href, disabled.
props.max: Maximum visible items. When exceeded, middle items collapse into `…`.
props.showHomeIcon: Adds a Home icon to the first item if it doesn't define `icon`.

emits.navigate: Emitted when clicking an item with `to` (not items with `href` or the current one).

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the breadcrumb navigation
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by interactive links inside the breadcrumb trail

dropdownMenu.title: DropdownMenu
dropdownMenu.description: Floating action menu with headers, dividers, keyboard shortcuts, descriptions, destructive items and external links.

seo.metaDescription: Free, open-source Vue Dropdown Menu for Vue 3 and Nuxt: a floating action menu with headers, dividers, keyboard shortcuts, descriptions, destructive items and links.
seo.intro: mood-ui's DropdownMenu is a free, open-source Vue 3 dropdown menu — a floating action menu with headers, dividers, keyboard shortcuts, descriptions, destructive items and external links.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Minimal menu: a list of items with labels. Default trigger uses the Button component.

icons.title: With icons & shortcuts
icons.desc: Each item supports optional `icon`, `shortcut` and `description` to enrich the reading.

dividers.title: With headers & dividers
dividers.desc: Group items with `header` entries and separate sections with `divider`.

user.title: User menu
user.desc: Common pattern: header with email, options and a divider before sign out.

danger.title: Destructive item
danger.desc: Mark an item as `danger` to tint it with the destructive color and emphasize irreversible actions.

props.items: Heterogeneous list of items, headers and dividers.
props.triggerLabel: Default trigger text. Ignored when using the `#trigger` slot.
props.triggerIcon: Optional icon for the default trigger.
props.triggerVariant: Button variant used as the trigger.
props.size: Size of the trigger and menu items.
props.radius: Radius applied to trigger and panel.
props.showChevron: Shows a chevron on the default trigger.
props.placement: Panel position relative to the trigger.
props.matchTriggerWidth: Forces the panel to match trigger width.
props.closeOnSelect: Closes the menu after selecting a non-disabled item.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible label applied to the panel.

emits.updateOpen: Emitted when the menu opens or closes.
emits.select: Emitted when an item is activated (click or keyboard); not fired for headers/dividers.

slots.trigger: Replaces the default trigger. Useful for wrapping an Avatar or other component.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbEnter: Activate the focused menu item or open the menu
a11y.kbEsc: Close the menu and return focus to the trigger
a11y.ariaExpanded: Indicates whether the menu panel is open
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the menu panel
a11y.focusTrigger: Focus returns to the trigger button when the menu closes
a11y.focusTrap: Focus is trapped inside the menu while open

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Accessible paginator with first/last jumps, configurable siblings and all the design system's visual tokens.

seo.metaDescription: Free, open-source Vue Pagination for Vue 3 and Nuxt: an accessible paginator with first and last jumps, configurable siblings and the full design-system token set.
seo.intro: mood-ui's Pagination is a free, open-source Vue 3 paginator — accessible pagination with first/last jumps, configurable siblings and all of the design system's visual tokens.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Paginator with first/last, prev/next and one sibling on each side by default.

siblings.title: More siblings
siblings.desc: Increase `sibling-count` to show more pages around the current one.

jump.title: Quick jump
jump.desc: Combine the paginator with a NumberInput to jump directly to a specific page.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes match the visual hierarchy of the surrounding context.

compact.title: Compact
compact.desc: Hides first/last buttons when space is tight or the context doesn't need them.

props.siblingCount: Sibling pages shown on each side of the current one.
props.boundaryCount: Pages pinned at the start and end of the range.
props.showFirstLast: Shows the first and last page buttons.
props.showPrevNext: Shows the previous and next page buttons.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the page changes. Used by v-model.
emits.change: Same payload as update:modelValue, useful for external listeners.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next page button
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous page button
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the pagination navigation
a11y.focusNative: Focus moves between page buttons using Tab

stepper.title: Stepper
stepper.description: Step-by-step progress indicator. Useful for wizards, onboarding and checkouts. Supports numbered, dots and progress variants, horizontal or vertical.

seo.metaDescription: Free, open-source Vue Stepper for Vue 3 and Nuxt: a step-by-step progress indicator for wizards, onboarding and checkouts with numbered, dots and progress variants.
seo.intro: mood-ui's Stepper is a free, open-source Vue 3 stepper component — a step-by-step progress indicator for wizards, onboarding and checkouts, with numbered, dots and progress variants in horizontal or vertical layout.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Three numbered steps; `current` marks the active one and all previous ones are marked completed.

descriptions.title: With descriptions & icons
descriptions.desc: Each step accepts a `description` and its own `icon` to reinforce context.

vertical.title: Vertical
vertical.desc: Switch `orientation` to vertical for long flows with extensive descriptions.

error.title: With error
error.desc: Override a step's state to `error` to flag a problem without blocking the rest of the flow.

props.steps: Steps to render in order. Each step accepts id, label, description, icon, disabled and state.
props.current: 0-based index of the active step. Previous steps are marked completed.
props.variant: Indicator style (number, dot or progress bar).
props.color: Semantic color for active and completed steps.
props.clickable: Enables clicks on completed steps; emits `step-click`.

emits.stepClick: Emitted when clicking a step with `clickable` enabled.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the stepper
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive element unless clickable prop is enabled

switcher.title: Switcher
switcher.description: Context switcher — change between branches, profiles, workspaces, or any equivalent contexts the user owns. Domain-agnostic.

seo.metaDescription: Free, open-source Vue Switcher for Vue 3 and Nuxt: a domain-agnostic context switcher to change between branches, profiles, workspaces or any contexts the user owns.
seo.intro: mood-ui's Switcher is a free, open-source Vue 3 context switcher — change between branches, profiles, workspaces or any equivalent contexts the user owns, fully domain-agnostic.

examples.basicDesc: Items with leading icons; one active; a footer action to add a new branch.
examples.profileDesc: Items with avatars, per-item edit pencil via #item-trailing, panelTitle, and a grouped footer.
examples.compactDesc: Two side-by-side variants: compactTrigger=true (hides subtitle) and a custom #trigger slot (avatar-only pill).
examples.searchableDesc: Long list with local filtering by title + subtitle and a no-results state.

a11y.kbArrow: Open panel and move highlight between options
a11y.kbEsc: Close panel and return focus to the trigger
a11y.kbTypeAhead: When not searchable, alphanumeric keys focus the first option whose title starts with that letter
a11y.ariaCombobox: Trigger acts as a combobox controlling a listbox
a11y.ariaActiveDesc: When searchable, aria-activedescendant tracks the highlighted option

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: Accessible tabs with three variants (line, pill, segmented), icons, badges and support for panels via `panel-{value}` slots.

seo.metaDescription: Free, open-source Vue Tabs for Vue 3 and Nuxt: accessible tabs with line, pill and segmented variants, icons, badges and panels via panel-{value} slots. Zero cost.
seo.intro: mood-ui's Tabs is a free, open-source Vue 3 tabs component — accessible tabs with three variants (line, pill, segmented), icons, badges and support for panels via panel-{value} slots.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Three visual styles: bottom line, filled pill and segmented control.

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Each item can declare an optional icon that renders to the left of the label.

panels.title: With panels
panels.desc: Define a `panel-{value}` slot per tab to show content synced with the selection.

controlled.title: Controlled
controlled.desc: Active state lives in your component; read and write through v-model.

badges.title: With badges
badges.desc: Each item supports a numeric or text `badge` shown to the right of the label.

props.items: Tab list. Each item accepts value, label, icon, badge, disabled, to.
props.modelValue: Value of the active tab. Use v-model.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the active tab.
props.size: Size and padding of each tab.
props.radius: Radius of pills/segmented. Inherits from ModoProvider.
props.fullWidth: Stretches the tablist to 100% and distributes items evenly.
props.lazy: Only mount panels the first time they're activated.
props.keepMounted: Keeps panels mounted (hidden) when switching tabs.
props.linkComponent: Component for items with `to`. Use RouterLink for vue-router.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the tab changes. Used by v-model.
emits.change: Emitted after a tab change with the complete item.

slots.panelByValue: Panel content for each item, identified by its value.
slots.panel: Fallback slot applied to panels that don't define their own slot.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus into or out of the tab list
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the tab list
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by the tablist; arrow keys navigate between tabs
